description: The Lamborghini Urus, produced from 2018, is the Italian marque's super SUV. Its 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 produces up to 666 bhp in Performante form, making it one of the fastest SUVs ever made. Sharing its MLB Evo platform with the Audi RS Q8, it has become Lamborghini's best-selling model.
